headline: Strategy Slides 6%, Coinbase Drops 5% as Saylor’s First Bitcoin Sale in Nearly 4 Years Triggers Crypto Selloff
summary: Shares of Strategy (NASDAQ:MSTR) are down 6% in early Monday trading, while Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) shares are off 5%. The selloff follows a weekend SEC filing showing Strategy executed its first Bitcoin sale since December 2022. MSTR stock is trading near $150 after closing Friday at $159.09, while COIN stock is hovering around $179.50 from a ...
